channel.title: Posts on Technically, A Socialist
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Technically, A Socialist

item.title: About
item.author: wat.tyler@tutamail.com (Wat Tyler)
item.description: Welcome, neighbors. You are welcome here in the home of Wat Tyler - man of Kent, friend of John Ball, rebel; and, in modern days, socialist, rebel, engineer. It is my firm belief that technology is a tool, not a savior, and that the capitalist class sells us the lie of technological salvation only as a means to control us; and that the only way forward is class warfare, which the wealthy have been waging against us for centuries. Whether technology is a tool we can put to use, or a tool we must put down - that remains to be seen.

item.title: Modern Enclosure
item.author: wat.tyler@tutamail.com (Wat Tyler)
item.description: Have you ever taken a walk in the English countryside? Have you seen the gentle wrinkles in the soil, felt them rise and fall almost imperceptibly under your feet as you wonder what the sheep think of you? Have you wondered, “Where do these wrinkles come from?” You may know the answer; but even if you do not know the answer, and even if you come from some far-away land, this wrinkled soil is a part of your own history, because it is a part of the history of capitalism, and it tells a story of the loss of the commons.

item.title: Contact
item.author: wat.tyler@tutamail.com (Wat Tyler)
item.description:
This is an example of a custom shortcode that you can put right into your content. You will need to add a form action to the the shortcode to make it work. Check out Formspark for a simple, free form service.

Ed theme is not strictly tied to any forms backend. You can easily use any backend like Formspark, Formspree, FabForm and so on just by changing the formAction parameter in the site configuration file.

item.title: Credits
item.author: wat.tyler@tutamail.com (Wat Tyler)
item.description:
Serghei Iakovlev | Software Engineer

Serghei Iakovlev is a software engineer with 20 years of experience in IT who enjoys finding elegant solutions to non-trivial problems. Serghei focused on the goal and driven by visual sophistication and laser-sharp precision, he takes pride in every finished project, and never stop learning along the way. Serghei work as the Head Of Development with 20 teams of 90+ engineers to develop airSlate — better nocode workflow automation platform.

item.title: Thank you
item.author: wat.tyler@tutamail.com (Wat Tyler)
item.description:
Your message will be sent within a short time. We’ll answer as soon as possible.
